main.description: Cancel a production order. Per ADR-2605202800 Phase 2, cancellation before delivery writes an escrowRefund record (no on-chain tx — escrow_intent never settled). Cancellation after delivery is structurally impossible (USDC already transferred via SDK pay()). Cancellable statuses: pending / accepted / material-procurement.

productionOrderUri.description: AT URI of the production order to cancel.

cancelledByDid.description: DID of the actor requesting cancellation (customer / manufacturer / arbiter).

status.description: cancelled = order successfully transitioned to cancelled state; cannotCancel = order already in terminal state (delivered/cancelled) or past cancellable window.

escrowRefundUri.description: AT URI of the escrow refund record (when escrow_intent was used). Refund is a record-only state transition — no on-chain transfer happened, so no on-chain refund needed.

cancellableStatuses.description: List of statuses from which cancellation is allowed.
